value.found_quote: `REVIEW.md` is a file at your repository root that overrides how Code Review behaves on your repo. Its contents are injected into the system prompt of every agent in the review pipeline as the highest-priority instruction block, taking precedence over the default review guidance.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes REVIEW.md as being injected as the highest-priority instruction block to control what Code Review flags. The broader Code Review feature is described as "in research preview," and REVIEW.md is part of that feature.
